description: Product Description Our Sofia The First Party Invitations are the perfect way to invite guests to your child's special Sofia The First birthday party. This package of 6 Party Invitations includes envelopes and features Princess Sofia in front of the castle on each invitation. Write important party details like date, location, and contact information in the spaces provided to let friends and family know about your child's special event. Be sure to search for other Sofia The First party supplies and our solid colour party decorations to make your Sofia The First party ideas come to life. Box Contains Package of 6 Sofia The First Invitations
